user_prompt: X3 game circular avatar frame, World Cup / soccer theme, FRANCE — BASE (group-stage) tier. DESIGN DIRECTION CHANGE vs reference image 1: the FRANCE national colors (blue-white-red tricolor) must strongly DOMINATE the entire ring band. GOLD is allowed ONLY as a thin minimal accent / hairline trim — NOT the main material. Drastically reduce gold; NO heavy gold baroque ornate metalwork, NO big gold wings, NO large gold gem cabochons. Keep the frame RESTRAINED, CLEAN, relatively PLAIN and UNIVERSAL — a simple elegant tricolor circular band that reads as understated. This is the base tier, must look tasteful and not busy. Composition: clean circular ring band primarily in blue-white-red; a SMALL simple stylized soccer ball accent at bottom-center (modest, not a giant ornament); top decoration minimal or none (at most a tiny tidy node). Art style: X3 clean cel-shaded cartoon game-UI, soft flat cel shading, clean crisp outlines, bright saturated colors. NOT painterly, NOT realistic, NOT gold-heavy. Use reference image 1 ONLY for the circular soccer-frame layout idea, NOT for its heavy gold look. Use reference image 2 only for the clean cel-shaded rendering style. Square 1:1 canvas, circular hollow center fully transparent for avatar, fully transparent background, readable at 256x256, NO text, NO flag cloth draped over top, NO scene background.
